summary: 本周重点：内容端优先抓两个可复制的爆款打法，一是做豆包IP相关的反差感同人内容，比如此前爆火的“豆包长脚跑马拉松”“傲娇AI少女质问”类强悬念钩子，自带大众认知基础，流量转化率远高于普通选题；二是做史诗级高速动态运镜转场的提示词教程，精准戳中短剧从业者刚需。工具端直接把评分9.2的FLUX.1-dev加入参考图、关键帧生产链路，出图稳定性远超同类模型，再把Wan2.2-Distill-Loras接入视频生成环节，提效同时能保障成片质感。

tools.name: Can GRPO be 10x Efficient? Kwai AI’s SRPO Suggests Yes with SRPO
tools.description: Kwai AI's SRPO framework slashes LLM RL post-training steps by 90% while matching DeepSeek-R1 performance in math and code. This two-stage RL approach with history resampling overcomes GRPO limitations. The post Can GRPO be 10x Efficient? Kwai AI’s SRPO Suggests Yes with SRPO first appeared on Synce
tools.summary: 快手SRPO大幅提升LLM训练效率

tools.name: Zhipu.AI’s Open-Source Power Play: Blazing-Fast GLM Models & Global Expansion Ahead of Potential IPO
